response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure (including MCP), and cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Docker), aligning well with the role's technical requirements. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of GenAI production-grade solutions, RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks. His recent AI-agent work is promising but not deeply detailed. The Bachelor's degree meets the requirement, but advanced degrees are preferred.
strengths: Strong full-stack development background with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, showing relevance to GenAI workflows
Proven leadership in technical projects and mentorship (e.g., workshops, TDD practices)
concerns: No explicit experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or GenAI production systems
Limited evidence of leading stakeholder-facing technical discovery sessions or customer-facing roles
Recent AI-agent work is promising but lacks depth in GenAI-specific technologies (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI, LLM optimization)
